headline: Agent loops and production agent tooling lead the window, with loops breaking out across both technique and momentum rankings.
body: Loops top the rotation as a leading technique and a breakout simultaneously, anchored by a 30+ hour build walkthrough that ships a loop engineer template and codebase harness. Production agent patterns dominate the new items: Databricks lays out a five-pillar framework for enterprise agents covering evaluation, observability, tracing, and governance, grounded in a retail bank chatbot case that caught 47 PII breaches before launch. Model Context Protocol recurs across multiple tutorials, including a LangGraph multi-agent travel planner with PostgreSQL memory and a Gemini-based custom vision agent. On the technique frontier, continual pretraining, uncertainty quantification, probabilistic inference, and equilibrium-seeking enter as new breakouts.

cited_items.title: The Production AI Playbook: Deploying Agents at Enterprise Scale — Sandipan Bhaumik, Databricks
Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI App with MCP + LangGraph | Part 2
How to build a custom vision agent
